---
title: "Charlotte Anderson Morshead"
---

## Charlotte Anderson Morshead

**Dates:** (1823/4-1888)

**Maiden name:** (Story)

### Description

mother of Mary Anderson Morshead

### Biography

she married Captain Pentyre Anderson Morshead and had a large family.  Her birth date sometimes appears 1820/1.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 17th [1876]
- Letter from January 19, 1869

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
